description: The Anova Precision Oven represents the pinnacle of combi-oven technology for the home and professional kitchen. Unlike standard convection ovens, this model includes a dedicated water tank for precise steam injection, allowing for bagless sous-vide cooking. This specific variant includes the food probe and wire racks, enabling moisture-controlled roasting and artisan bread baking. The 2.0 iteration features improved Wi-Fi connectivity and enhanced sensors compared to the original release, ensuring consistent temperature management within 0.1 degrees Celsius for professional-grade culinary results every time.
features: 1800W heating element, 25°C to 250°C thermal range, dual-speed convection fan, 5L external water tank, 34L internal cavity, wet-bulb and dry-bulb sensors, Wi-Fi connectivity.
uses: Sous-vide cooking, steam injection baking, dehydration, air frying, steam roasting, defrosting.

accessories.name: Wire Rack
accessories.description: Standard stainless steel grid for airflow.

accessories.name: Sheet Pan
accessories.description: Aluminium baking tray sized for the 34L cavity.

accessories.name: Food Probe
accessories.description: Detachable digital thermometer for core temperature monitoring.

accessories.name: Perforated Pan
accessories.description: Specialised tray for intense steam circulation.

name: Anova Culinary Precision Oven
